label: tRTRRD
condition_selectors: previous command is read/training class; Table398 Note3 path
notes_ko: Read/MRR/RFF/RDC 계열 이후 WFF/RD/RDC 등으로 새 sync path를 잡을 때 쓰는 guard. data_rate는 speed_bin에서 한 번만 생성되어 RL/BLN/tCK에 공유된다.

label: Read Latency
condition_selectors: MR1 speed code plus feature selector chooses Table49-72 row
notes_ko: Raw MR bit가 아니라 Read DBI/DVFSL/Link Protection 같은 semantic leaf가 latency table selector로 들어간다.

label: WCK Postamble
formula_or_lookup: RD((MR22 WCK PST coefficient * tWCK) / tCK)
notes_ko: WCK Sync-Off deadline의 read/write deadline에 공통으로 쓰인다.

label: Write Latency
formula_or_lookup: MR1 latency table lookup + WL Set A/B selection
condition_selectors: MR1 speed code plus feature selector chooses Table49-72 row; MR1.OP[5] selects WL Set
notes_ko: Write command 기준 data input latency. ODTLon formula도 WL-k 형태라 WL을 공유한다.

label: tRTW
formula_or_lookup: ODT off: RL + BLN + RU(tWCK2DQO/tCK) - WL; ODT on: RL + BLN + RU(tWCK2DQO/tCK) + RD(tRPST/tCK) - ODTLon - RD(tODTon_MIN/tCK) + 1; final EVEN(base + note adders)
condition_selectors: same_bg selects BLN_MAX vs BLN_MIN; DQ ODT effective selects ODT-on formula; DFEQ and Per-pin DFE notes add cycles
rounding_or_conversion: RU for tWCK2DQO/tCK; RD for tRPST/tCK and tODTon_MIN/tCK; final EVEN
notes_ko: WCK2CK Sync-Off RD->WR pair에서 command_min_gap로 쓰인다. 내부의 RL/tCK/data_rate는 별도 복사본이 아니라 공통 symbol reference다.

label: tWTR_S
condition_selectors: DVFSL, Write Link Protection, Efficiency mode select Table414/416/417/418/419/421/422/423 row
rounding_or_conversion: RU ns floor to nCK then max with nCK floor
notes_ko: WR->RD different BG command gap의 component.

label: tWTR_L
condition_selectors: DVFSL, Write Link Protection, Efficiency mode select Table414/416/417/418/419/421/422/423 row
rounding_or_conversion: RU ns floor to nCK then max with nCK floor
notes_ko: WR->RD same BG command gap의 component.

label: tWCK2DQO max
formula_or_lookup: Table477 lookup of tWCK2DQO_* max value
condition_selectors: WCK FM chooses HF/LF family; DVFSL selects LF_L path; data_rate selects row
rounding_or_conversion: ps value; converted by callers as RU((ps/1000)/tCK)
notes_ko: tRTW에서 RU(tWCK2DQO/tCK)로 들어간다. temp/voltage variation coefficients are captured but not yet applied without corner inputs.

label: ODTLon
formula_or_lookup: ODT table lookup, DQ ODT path uses WL-k by speed row
condition_selectors: DQ ODT effective true selects Table319 path; speed row selects WL-k
notes_ko: tRTW ODT-on formula에서 subtract되는 synchronous ODT on latency.

label: tODTon min
condition_selectors: DQ ODT effective true selects async ODT row
rounding_or_conversion: RD to nCK for current evaluator path

label: tODTon max
formula_or_lookup: tODTon_MAX_ns table lookup; optional RU(tODTon_MAX_ns/tCK) when nCK guard is needed
condition_selectors: DQ ODT effective true selects async ODT row
rounding_or_conversion: ns direct; RU to nCK for max guard
notes_ko: DQ ODT turn-on이 fully on 되는 max bound. target calculator exposes ns and RU-converted nCK.

label: tODT_RDon max
formula_or_lookup: Read NT-ODT async_on_max_ns lookup; optional RU(async_on_max_ns/tCK)
condition_selectors: DQ path uses Table331; RDQS path uses Table332-335 selectors
rounding_or_conversion: ns direct; RU to nCK for max guard
notes_ko: Read command 기준 NT-ODT turn-on max. DQ/RDQS target과 RDQS selector가 leaf로 관리된다.
